section_miscategorizations.text: He reports one plus nonpitting edema in his lower extremities.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Edema is documented as an exam finding in the Findings section, so repeating it as a patient-reported item in HPI is slightly disorganized, though not misleading.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient presents with coronary artery disease, stage 3 chronic kidney disease, and poorly controlled diabetes mellitus.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Stage 3 CKD and poorly controlled diabetes are established chronic conditions rather than a synthesized diagnostic impression in this note; however, listing active problems in Assessment is common practice and not substantially misleading.
